settings.headline: That's 7% cashback — for about 15 minutes of filming.
settings.subheadline: Send us an honest review video plus a few clips of you using your Nuracom, and we'll refund 7% of your order — approximately $100 per customer. Real customers. Real footage. Fair reward.

settings.title: The unboxing
settings.description: Film the moment you open the box — packaging, contents, first impressions. Keep it casual and honest.

settings.title: Installation
settings.description: Record a sped-up install or key moments (mounting brackets, clicking into place, first power-on). Show how easy or hard it really was for you.

settings.title: First use
settings.description: Load it up, run your first cycle. Show us the rack in action, the app/remote, the lighting. Honest reactions only — this is the gold.

settings.title: Your review
settings.description: Look into the camera and give us your real verdict. Good, bad, surprising. What do you wish you'd known? Would you recommend it?

settings.text: Use natural daylight when possible — no ring lights needed
Phone camera is perfect — no need for anything fancier
Don't edit — raw clips are what we want
Be yourself — no overly polished reviews!

settings.headline: Four short clips. About 15 minutes total.
settings.subheadline: No fancy editing or scripts. Just you, your phone, and your honest experience with your Nuracom. The more natural, the better — that's the footage that actually helps us.
settings.nopressure_text: If something isn't working for you, tell us. If installation was harder than expected, tell us. Genuine reviews — good AND bad — are what we're paying cashback for. We can't improve if everyone only says nice things. Your real opinion is worth more than a polished one.

settings.headline: Submit your clips — claim your cashback.
settings.subheadline: Upload your videos to Google Drive, Dropbox, or WeTransfer, then paste the sharing link below. We'll review within 3–5 business days and email you with approval + cashback details.
settings.video_link_hint: Upload to Google Drive / Dropbox / WeTransfer and paste a viewable share link here
settings.agreement_text: I confirm this footage is genuinely mine and I'm happy for Nuracom to use it in marketing (social, paid ads, website). Reviews are refundable whether positive or negative — cashback is for the genuine footage, not a requirement for a 5-star review.
settings.next_steps_text: We review within 3–5 business days. If approved, we'll email you a confirmation and process your 7% cashback to the payment method you used at checkout. If we need clarification or more footage, we'll let you know what's missing.
settings.success_text: Thanks for filming — we really appreciate it. You'll get a confirmation email within a few minutes, and we'll follow up within 3–5 business days with your cashback status. Keep an eye on your inbox (check spam just in case).
